homepage.title: Welcome to GiftCard Verify
homepage.subtitle: Verify your gift cards securely and instantly
homepage.heroDescription: Our platform provides a fast, secure, and reliable way to verify the authenticity of your gift cards. Get instant results with our advanced verification system.
homepage.benefitsSubtitle: A platform designed to offer you a simple, fast, and secure verification experience
homepage.benefitFastDesc: Get results in seconds with our advanced technology
homepage.benefitSecureDesc: Your data is encrypted and protected at all times
homepage.benefitSupportDesc: Our team is always available to help you
homepage.benefitMaxSecurityDesc: Your data is protected with bank-level encryption. Every transaction is secured and confidential.
homepage.benefitInstantVerificationDesc: Get results in seconds thanks to our advanced verification technology.
homepage.benefitGuaranteedReliabilityDesc: 98% success rate with continuous improvements and rigorous checks.
homepage.benefitMultiCurrencyDesc: Verify your coupons in EUR, USD, GBP and many other currencies.
homepage.benefitEmailNotificationsDesc: Receive a detailed confirmation by email for every verification performed.
homepage.benefitFullHistoryDesc: Access the history of all your verifications at any time from your dashboard.
homepage.statsSubtitle: Statistics that reflect our reliability and the trust of our users
homepage.supportedCouponsDesc: Verify the validity of your coupons among our wide selection of supported brands and services
homepage.ctaDescription: Join thousands of users who trust GiftCard Verify for fast and secure coupon verification.
homepage.footerDescription: The trusted platform for verifying the authenticity of your gift cards and prepaid coupons. Verify the validity of your coupons instantly.
homepage.secureServiceDesc: Secure coupon and prepaid card verification service
homepage.legalMentionsText:
Legal Notices

Company name: CouponVerify SAS
Head office: 123 Avenue des Champs-Élysées, 75008 Paris, France
SIRET: 123 456 789 00012
Share capital: €50,000

Publication director: Jean Dupont
Host: OVH SAS, 2 rue Kellermann, 59100 Roubaix, France

Contact: contact@couponverify.fr
Phone: +33 1 23 45 67 89
homepage.legalPrivacyText:
Privacy Policy

1. Data Collection
We only collect data necessary for verifying your coupons: coupon codes, amounts, currencies, dates, and email addresses.

2. Data Usage
Your data is used exclusively for processing your verification requests and sending notifications.

3. Data Protection
All data is encrypted and stored securely. We never share your information with third parties.

4. Your Rights
You have the right to access, rectify, and delete your personal data.
homepage.legalTermsText:
Terms of Use

1. Acceptance of Terms
By using CouponVerify, you accept these terms of use.

2. Service Provided
CouponVerify is a coupon and prepaid card verification platform. We do not guarantee the acceptance of coupons by merchants.

3. Responsibilities
The user is responsible for the accuracy of the information provided. CouponVerify cannot be held responsible for input errors.

4. Service Modification
We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the service at any time.
homepage.legalCookiesText:
Cookie Policy

1. What is a cookie?
A cookie is a small text file stored on your device when you visit our site.

2. Cookies Used
- Essential cookies: necessary for the site to function
- Analytics cookies: to improve our services
- Preference cookies: to remember your choices

3. Cookie Management
You can disable cookies in your browser settings. Some site features may be affected.

4. Storage Duration
Cookies are stored for a maximum of 13 months.

couponVerification.title: Coupon Verification
couponVerification.emailDescription: You will receive the verification result by email
couponVerification.importantToKnowDesc: Make sure all entered information is correct before submitting. An incorrect code or amount may result in failed verification.
couponVerification.needMoreHelpDesc: If you can't find the answer to your question, contact our support team for personalized assistance.
couponVerification.successMessage: Your coupon has been verified successfully and is valid. You can use it with confidence.
couponVerification.rejectedMessage: Unfortunately, this coupon is not valid. Please check the information entered or contact support.
couponVerification.pendingMessage: Your verification request is being processed. You will receive a notification by email once the process is completed.
couponVerification.blockedMessage: This coupon has been blocked for security reasons. Please contact our customer service for more information.
couponVerification.duplicateMessage: This coupon has already been verified. Please check your verification history.
couponVerification.errorMessage: An error occurred during verification. Please try again.
couponVerification.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
couponVerification.codeMinLength: Code must be at least 8 characters
couponVerification.formSubtitle: Fill in all fields to verify your coupon
couponVerification.securityNote: Your information is secure and used only for verification. The process usually takes a few seconds.
couponVerification.submissionError: Error submitting the verification. Please try again.
couponVerification.selectCouponDesc: Choose the coupon you want to request a refund for.
couponVerification.nextStepsDesc: A confirmation email has been sent to your address. You can track the status of your verification at any time from your dashboard.
couponVerification.instruction1Desc: The code is usually located on the back of the card or on the purchase receipt
couponVerification.instruction2Desc: Make sure to enter the exact amount and select the correct currency
couponVerification.instruction3Title: Enter the recharge date and time
couponVerification.instruction3Desc: These details help verify the validity of the coupon
couponVerification.instruction4Desc: You will receive a confirmation email with the verification results
couponVerification.faq1Answer: Verification is usually completed within minutes. In some cases, manual review may take up to 24 hours.
couponVerification.faq2Question: What if my coupon is marked as invalid?
couponVerification.faq2Answer: Check that you entered the correct code and amount. If the problem persists, contact our support with your reference number.
couponVerification.faq3Question: Can I verify multiple coupons at once?
couponVerification.faq3Answer: Currently, each coupon must be verified individually to ensure maximum accuracy of results.
couponVerification.faq4Answer: Yes, all your data is encrypted and protected. We only use your information for verification purposes.
couponVerification.faq5Answer: A pending verification is being processed by our team. You will receive a notification by email once the result is available.
couponVerification.faq6Answer: You can contact our support team via the email address listed in the site footer, or through the contact form.
